title: StartInTheNether
description: A simple mod for StAPI (Minecraft beta 1.7.3) that makes Nether default spawn dimension
body:
A simple mod for StAPI (Minecraft beta 1.7.3) that makes Nether default spawn dimension.

Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer.

Can be combined with [BetterNetherBeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-nether-beta) mod to get unique survival experience.
